## Responsive UI check, if applicable

## Content/licensing impact

- [ ] No unapproved official Ironsworn rulebook prose, move text, oracle text, asset text, art, icons, copied layout, screenshots, or trade dress was added.
- [ ] Original app helper text is used where new explanatory text was needed.
- [ ] New bundled content has source, license, attribution, and provenance notes where applicable.
- [ ] User-authored content is treated separately from bundled app content.
- [ ] Content/licensing docs were updated or no update was needed.
